params.name: app_url.url
rules: 站点URL格式不正确，必须携带http(s)://

params.name: subscribe_url.url
rules: 订阅URL格式不正确，必须携带http(s)://

params.name: server_token.min
rules: 通讯密钥长度必须大于16位

params.name: tos_url.url
rules: 服务条款URL格式不正确，必须携带http(s)://

params.name: telegram_discuss_link.url
rules: Telegram群组地址必须为URL格式，必须携带http(s)://

params.name: logo.url
rules: LOGO URL格式不正确，必须携带https(s)://

params.name: secure_path.min
rules: 后台路径长度最小为8位

params.name: secure_path.regex
rules: 后台路径只能为字母或数字
